summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the redesigned customer dashboard (/my-enquiries). All features working correctly: welcome header with user name/email, quick stats (enquiries, saved venues, viewed), quick action buttons, My Favorites section, Recently Viewed section, and enhanced booking requests list with empty state CTA. Auth gate for heart button redirects to login correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: MyEnquiriesPage correctly uses useAuth() for user info (firstName from name.split(' ')[0]), and displays email
Quick stats correctly show: favoriteIds.length for saved, enquiries.length for enquiries, recentVenues.length for viewed
My Favorites section uses /api/venues/batch to fetch venue details for favoriteIds (limited to 4)
Recently Viewed uses localStorage key 'bmv_recently_viewed' and displays up to 4 venues
Empty state for enquiries shows 'Discover Venues' CTA with navigation to /venues/search
All data-testids are correctly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test venue: venue_658884a4e9c1 (Taj Palace New Delhi) for favorites, venue_563b92aa473c (The Leela Palace New Delhi) for recently viewed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer dashboard testing complete. Key data-testids: dashboard-welcome, stat-enquiries, stat-favorites, stat-viewed, action-browse, action-favorites, action-expert, dashboard-favorites, view-all-favorites, dash-fav-{venue_id}, dashboard-recently-viewed, dash-recent-{venue_id}, dashboard-enquiries, enquiries-empty. localStorage key 'bmv_recently_viewed' stores recently viewed venues. Favorites use FavoritesContext with backend persistence for authenticated users.

quick_action_buttons.talk_to_expert_button: PASS - Button exists, opens WhatsApp in new tab

my_favorites_section.venue_cards_with_images: PASS - Shows venue image, name, location
my_favorites_section.rating_badge: PASS - Shows 4.8 rating for Taj Palace

recently_viewed_section.section_displays: PASS - Shows after visiting a venue detail page

booking_requests_section.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No booking requests yet' with Discover Venues CTA

mobile_responsiveness_375px.stats_in_row: PASS - 3 columns of stats fit in mobile view
mobile_responsiveness_375px.action_buttons_visible: PASS - All 3 buttons visible and functional

auth_gate.heart_button_redirect: PASS - Redirects to /login?redirect=/venues/search when not authenticated

favorites_integration.heart_button_on_venue_cards: PASS - Shows filled heart for favorited venues
favorites_integration.favorited_venue_in_dashboard: PASS - Taj Palace shows in My Favorites section
